scope: Learner app pathway lesson assessments vs marketing PathwayLessonQuizzes

components.role: Orchestrates toggle, pre card, lesson children, post card; loads prior scores via GET /api/learner/lesson-assessment.
components.progressTracking: PathwayLessonProgressStatus from PATHWAY_LESSON_PROGRESS_EVENT; prior scores from API
components.parityGapBefore: Pre/post used LessonAssessmentQuiz (submit-all-then-grade) vs marketing immediate per-item feedback; no n/total pill; no post Practice/Exam toggle; post card had invalid setState during render for locked/idle sync
components.safestFix: Shared PathwayLessonQuizSet + itemsResetKey; derive post phase with useMemo; parent keys for mode/items

components.parityGapBefore: No progress pill matching marketing; single-submit quiz UX differed
components.safestFix: Swap running body for PathwayLessonQuizSet variant=pre; suppress duplicate score in complete card

components.parityGapBefore: No Practice/Exam post mode; render-time setState bug; LessonAssessmentQuiz only
components.safestFix: postTestMode state + key remount; resolvedPhase useMemo; PathwayLessonQuizSet variant=post

components.role: Legacy submit-all MCQ runner (still used elsewhere if imported)
components.parityGapBefore: Not used for pathway pre/post after parity pass in learner cards
components.safestFix: Leave module intact for other consumers

bankBackedAssumptions: LessonAssessmentFlow receives preTest/postTest from page (same bank merge as marketing when wired); no API contract change.
